summary: Multi-language feature testing completed. Language switcher works correctly - clicking changes language dynamically without page reload. Fixed one issue in HomePage.jsx where 'Recent Ads' section had hardcoded Romanian text instead of using t() function.
passed_tests: Language selector (data-testid='language-selector') visible and clickable in header
Language dropdown shows both options: Română (🇷🇴) and English (🇬🇧)
Clicking language option changes UI text dynamically WITHOUT page reload
Language preference persists in localStorage (key: 'x67_language')
Header 'Post Ad' button translates: 'Adaugă Anunț' ↔ 'Post Ad'
Header 'Login' button translates: 'Autentificare' ↔ 'Login'
Homepage 'Popular Categories' section title translates: 'Categorii Populare' ↔ 'Popular Categories'
Homepage 'Popular Categories' subtitle translates correctly
Homepage 'Featured Ads' section title translates: 'Anunțuri Promovate' ↔ 'Featured Ads'
Homepage 'Recent Ads' section title translates: 'Anunțuri Recente' ↔ 'Recent Ads' (FIXED)
Homepage 'Recent Ads' subtitle translates: 'Cele mai noi anunțuri' ↔ 'Latest ads' (FIXED)
Homepage 'View all' button translates: 'Vezi toate' ↔ 'View all' (FIXED)
Homepage CTA section translates: 'Ai ceva de vândut?' ↔ 'Have something to sell?'
Homepage 'Publish Free' button translates: 'Publică Gratuit' ↔ 'Publish Free'
Auth page 'Welcome back!' translates: 'Bine ai revenit!' ↔ 'Welcome back!'
Auth page 'Sign in to continue' translates correctly
Auth page 'Continue with Google' translates: 'Continuă cu Google' ↔ 'Continue with Google'
Auth page form labels translate (Email, Password/Parolă)
Auth page 'Forgot password?' translates: 'Ai uitat parola?' ↔ 'Forgot password?'
Auth page submit button translates: 'Intră în cont' ↔ 'Sign In'
Auth page toggle text translates: 'Nu ai cont? Înregistrare' ↔ 'Don't have an account? Register'
Auth page hero text translates correctly
Footer 'Popular Categories' heading translates
Footer 'Useful Links' heading translates: 'Link-uri Utile' ↔ 'Useful Links'
Footer category names translate (Escorts, Real Estate, Cars, etc.)
Footer links translate (Terms & Conditions, Privacy Policy, FAQ, etc.)
Footer description text translates
Footer copyright text translates: 'Toate drepturile rezervate' ↔ 'All rights reserved'
Footer 'Secure payments via' translates: 'Plăți securizate prin' ↔ 'Secure payments via'
critical_code_review_comments: Banner carousel text (e.g., 'Găsește mașina perfectă') comes from database and does not use translation system - this is expected as banner content is managed separately
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/pages/HomePage.jsx - Fixed hardcoded Romanian text in Recent Ads section to use t() function
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-language feature fully tested and working. Language switcher in header (data-testid='language-selector') changes UI text dynamically without page reload. Supports Romanian (ro) and English (en). Language preference stored in localStorage with key 'x67_language'. All major components use t() function from LanguageContext for translations. Fixed one issue where Recent Ads section in HomePage.jsx had hardcoded Romanian text.

fix_applied.description: Changed hardcoded Romanian text to use t() translation function
